chapter_title.ar: باب مَنْ تُكْرَهُ مُعَامَلَتُهُ وَ مُخَالَطَتُهُ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 59 – The ones with whom dealings and inter-mingling is abhorred

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (19/144)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (19/144)
text: قَالَ لِي أَبُو عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) لَا تَشْتَرِ مِنْ مُحَارَفٍ فَإِنَّ صَفْقَتَهُ لَا بَرَكَةَ فِيهَا .

en.hubeali: A number of our companions, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Ibn Mahboub, from Al Abbas Bin Al Waleed Bin Sabeeh, from his father who said,
‘Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> said to me: ‘Do not buy from a corrupter (mixer of the goods), for there is no Blessing in his deal’.
en.sarwar: 1. A number of our people have narrated from Ahmad ibn Muhammad from ibn Mahbub from al-‘Abbas ibn al-Walid ibn Sabih from his father who has said the following: “Abu ‘ Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, once said to me, ‘You must not purchase from a Muharaf (unfortunate) person; making a deal with such people is devoid of blessings.’ ”
